briefing_zh:
本周末的 AI 研究围绕三大主题展开：**Agent 能力边界的真实评估**、**新计算范式的探索**、以及**开源模型的民主化**。

**ClawBench** 和 **OmniBehavior** 两篇 benchmark 论文同时揭示了一个残酷现实：当 AI Agent 面对真实网站的写操作任务时，即使最强的前沿模型成功率也仅 0.7%–33.3%；而在模拟复杂人类行为方面，LLM 的最高得分仅 44.55。这些结果表明，尽管 demo 效果炫目，Agent 在生产环境中的可靠性仍有巨大差距。与此同时，**SkillClaw** 提出了一种让 Agent 技能通过跨用户经验持续进化的方案，平均提升 42.1%，为缩小这一差距提供了新思路。

Meta AI 的 **Neural Computers** 论文提出了一种全新的计算范式——将计算、内存和 I/O 完全内化到神经网络的学习运行时状态中。这是一个大胆的愿景：不再需要传统操作系统，神经网络本身就是计算机。虽然目前仅是原型阶段，但其在终端屏幕生成和 GUI 控制上的初步结果令人瞩目。

开源生态方面，**Qwen3.6-35B-A3B** 在 Hacker News 上引爆热议（1253 分），这是一个仅用 3B 活跃参数就实现强大编程 Agent 能力的 MoE 模型。GitHub 上 **obscura**（无头浏览器）等新项目也在快速崛起，反映出社区对 Agent 基础设施的旺盛需求。Cloudflare 推出专为 Agent 设计的推理层，标志着大厂正在为「Agent 时代」的基础设施做布局。
briefing_en:
This weekend's AI research converges on three themes: **real-world evaluation of agent capabilities**, **new computing paradigms**, and **open-source democratization**.

**ClawBench** and **OmniBehavior** — two benchmark papers released simultaneously — paint a sobering picture: frontier AI agents achieve only 0.7%–33.3% success on real-world web write tasks, and LLMs max out at 44.55 when simulating complex human behavior. Despite impressive demos, production-grade reliability remains far off. Meanwhile, **SkillClaw** proposes a framework for continuous skill evolution through collective cross-user experience, achieving +42.1% average improvement — a promising path to close this gap.

Meta AI's **Neural Computers** introduces a bold new computing paradigm that internalizes computation, memory, and I/O entirely within a neural model's learned runtime state. The vision: the neural network IS the computer, no traditional OS needed. While still a prototype, initial results on terminal screen generation and GUI control are striking.

On the open-source front, **Qwen3.6-35B-A3B** exploded on Hacker News (1253 points) — a MoE model delivering strong agentic coding with just 3B active parameters. GitHub projects like **obscura** (headless browser for agents) are gaining rapid traction, reflecting growing demand for agent infrastructure. Cloudflare's launch of an agent-specific inference layer signals that major platforms are gearing up for the "age of agents".
viral_analysis_zh: **Qwen3.6-35B-A3B** 是今天最可能出圈的项目——「35B 参数但只需 3B 活跃」的 MoE 架构精准击中了开源社区对高性能低成本 Agent 模型的渴望，HN 1253 分证明了这一点。标题中的「agentic coding power, now open to all」完美利用了开源民主化叙事。**Neural Computers** 则凭借「神经网络就是计算机」的激进概念和 Meta AI 的背书，在学术社区持续发酵。
viral_analysis_en: **Qwen3.6-35B-A3B** is today's most viral candidate — the '35B params, 3B active' MoE architecture precisely hits the open-source community's desire for high-performance, low-cost agent models, as evidenced by 1253 HN points. The framing 'agentic coding power, now open to all' perfectly leverages the open-source democratization narrative. **Neural Computers** keeps gaining traction in academic circles with its radical 'the neural network IS the computer' concept and Meta AI backing.

huggingface_papers.title: HY-World 2.0: A Multi-Modal World Model for Reconstructing, Generating, and Simulating 3D Worlds
huggingface_papers.tldr: HY-World 2.0 is a multi-modal world model that unifies 3D reconstruction, generation, and simulation. It handles diverse inputs (text, images, video) to create and simulate 3D worlds, advancing embodied AI and virtual environment creation.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: HY-World 2.0 是一个多模态世界模型，统一了 3D 重建、生成和仿真。支持文本、图像、视频等多种输入来创建和模拟 3D 世界，推动具身 AI 和虚拟环境构建。
huggingface_papers.authors: Team HY-World, Chenjie Cao, Xuhui Zuo et al.

huggingface_papers.title: DR^{3}-Eval: Towards Realistic and Reproducible Deep Research Evaluation
huggingface_papers.tldr: DR³-Eval proposes a realistic and reproducible evaluation framework for deep research systems. It addresses the lack of standardized benchmarks by creating controlled test scenarios that measure research depth, accuracy, and reasoning quality.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: DR³-Eval 提出了一个真实可复现的深度研究系统评估框架。通过创建受控测试场景来衡量研究深度、准确性和推理质量，填补了标准化评测的空白。
huggingface_papers.authors: Qianqian Xie, Qingheng Xiong, He Zhu et al.

huggingface_papers.title: RAD-2: Scaling Reinforcement Learning in a Generator-Discriminator Framework
huggingface_papers.tldr: RAD-2 scales reinforcement learning within a generator-discriminator framework, improving both generation quality and alignment. The approach shows strong results on reasoning and creative tasks by combining RL with adversarial training dynamics.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: RAD-2 在生成器-判别器框架中扩展强化学习，提升生成质量和对齐效果。通过结合 RL 与对抗训练动态，在推理和创作任务上取得显著提升。
huggingface_papers.authors: Hao Gao, Shaoyu Chen, Yifan Zhu et al.

huggingface_papers.title: How to Fine-Tune a Reasoning Model? A Teacher-Student Cooperation Framework to Synthesize Student-Consistent SFT Data
huggingface_papers.tldr: A teacher-student cooperation framework for fine-tuning reasoning models. The teacher model guides the student through structured reasoning steps, achieving better performance than standard fine-tuning while requiring less data.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 提出一种教师-学生协作框架来微调推理模型。教师模型通过结构化推理步骤引导学生模型，以更少数据实现比标准微调更好的效果。
huggingface_papers.authors: Zixian Huang, Kaichen Yang, Xu Huang et al.

huggingface_papers.title: GlobalSplat: Efficient Feed-Forward 3D Gaussian Splatting via Global Scene Tokens
huggingface_papers.tldr: GlobalSplat enables efficient feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting via global scene priors. It achieves fast 3D reconstruction from sparse views by leveraging learned global representations, improving both speed and quality over per-scene optimization.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: GlobalSplat 通过全局场景先验实现高效的前馈式 3D 高斯溅射。利用学习到的全局表示从稀疏视角快速重建 3D，在速度和质量上优于逐场景优化。
huggingface_papers.authors: Roni Itkin, Noam Issachar, Yehonatan Keypur et al.

alphaxiv_papers.title: SkillClaw: Let Skills Evolve Collectively with Agentic Evolver
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: SkillClaw enables LLM agent skills to continuously evolve through collective cross-user experiences. An autonomous 'agentic evolver' refines, creates, and updates skills automatically, achieving +42.1% average improvement across diverse real-world tasks.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: SkillClaw 让 LLM agent 技能通过跨用户的集体经验持续进化。自主的「智能进化器」自动改进、创建和更新技能，在多种真实任务上平均提升 42.1%。

alphaxiv_papers.title: Neural Computers
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Meta AI introduces Neural Computers (NCs), a new paradigm where neural models internalize computation, memory, and I/O within a learned runtime state. Prototype NCs generate high-fidelity terminal screens and control GUI interactions from user I/O traces.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: Meta AI 提出神经计算机（Neural Computers），一种将计算、内存和 I/O 内化到学习运行时状态中的新范式。原型可以生成高保真终端屏幕并直接从用户交互轨迹控制 GUI。

alphaxiv_papers.title: Externalization in LLM Agents: A Unified Review of Memory, Skills, Protocols and Harness Engineering
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Proposes 'externalization' as a unifying principle for LLM agent design — relocating cognitive burdens to persistent external structures (memory, skills, protocols). Provides a comprehensive framework for understanding and building robust agent systems.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 提出「外化」作为 LLM Agent 设计的统一原则——将认知负担转移到持久外部结构（记忆、技能、协议）。为构建可靠 Agent 系统提供了全面的理论框架。

alphaxiv_papers.title: ClawBench: Can AI Agents Complete Everyday Online Tasks?
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: A benchmark evaluating AI agents on 153 write-heavy tasks across 144 live production websites with safe interception. Even frontier models only achieve 0.7%–33.3% success rates, revealing a huge gap between current benchmarks and real-world web task difficulty.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 在 144 个真实网站上评测 AI Agent 完成 153 个「写操作」任务的能力。即使最强模型成功率也仅 0.7%–33.3%，揭示了现有 benchmark 与真实 web 任务难度之间的巨大差距。

alphaxiv_papers.title: Towards Real-world Human Behavior Simulation: Benchmarking Large Language Models on Long-horizon, Cross-scenario, Heterogeneous Behavior Traces
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: OmniBehavior benchmark uses real-world industrial data to test LLMs on simulating complex human behavior across scenarios. Current LLMs max out at 44.55 overall score, showing a 'positivity-and-average' bias in behavior simulation.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: OmniBehavior 基准使用真实工业数据测试 LLM 模拟跨场景复杂人类行为的能力。当前 LLM 最高总分仅 44.55，呈现出「积极化和平均化」的模拟偏差。

github_repos.name: h4ckf0r0day/obscura
github_repos.tldr: A headless browser built specifically for AI agents and web scraping. Designed to handle dynamic websites, CAPTCHAs, and anti-bot measures, providing reliable browser automation for agent workflows.
github_repos.tldr_zh: 专为 AI Agent 和网页抓取设计的无头浏览器。能处理动态网页、验证码和反爬机制，为 Agent 工作流提供可靠的浏览器自动化。

github_repos.name: poseljacob/agentic-video-editor
github_repos.tldr: AI-powered video editor that transforms raw footage into polished content using natural language instructions. Agents handle cutting, transitions, effects, and color grading autonomously.
github_repos.tldr_zh: AI 驱动的视频编辑器，通过自然语言指令将原始素材转化为精美内容。Agent 自主处理剪辑、转场、特效和调色。

github_repos.name: ChatPRD/tradclaw
github_repos.tldr: AI-powered household manager for 'agentic parenting' — helps manage family schedules, meal planning, homework tracking, and household tasks through conversational AI agents.
github_repos.tldr_zh: AI 驱动的家庭管理助手，实现「智能育儿」——通过对话式 AI Agent 管理家庭日程、餐饮规划、作业跟踪和家务。

github_repos.name: fluentlc/claude-code-java
github_repos.tldr: claude-code-java 是一个可嵌入任何 Java 应用的 AI Agent 引擎。claude-code-java is an embeddable AI Agent engine for Java applications.
github_repos.tldr_zh: claude-code-java 是一个可嵌入任何 Java 应用的 AI Agent 引擎。claude-code-java is an embeddable AI Agent engine for Java applications.

github_repos.name: AIScientists-Dev/WorldSeed
github_repos.tldr: A world engine where AI agents live autonomously — physical rules, information asymmetry, any agent can plug in. Define scenarios in YAML, watch stories emerge.
github_repos.tldr_zh: A world engine where AI agents live autonomously — physical rules, information asymmetry, any agent can plug in. Define scenarios in YAML, watch stories emerge.

hackernews.title: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B: Agentic coding power, now open to all
hackernews.tldr: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B is a new open-source MoE model delivering strong agentic coding performance with only 3B active parameters. It democratizes AI agent capabilities previously limited to proprietary models, running efficiently on consumer hardware.
hackernews.tldr_zh: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B 是新的开源 MoE 模型，仅用 3B 活跃参数即可实现强大的智能编程能力。将原本只有闭源模型才有的 Agent 能力带给消费级硬件。

hackernews.title: Cloudflare's AI Platform: an inference layer designed for agents
hackernews.tldr: Cloudflare launches an inference layer designed specifically for AI agents — providing routing, caching, and orchestration primitives that handle the unique patterns of agent-to-model communication at scale.
hackernews.tldr_zh: Cloudflare 推出专为 AI Agent 设计的推理层——提供路由、缓存和编排原语，大规模处理 Agent 与模型之间的独特通信模式。

hackernews.title: Are the costs of AI agents also rising exponentially? (2025)
hackernews.tldr: Analysis of whether AI agent costs are scaling exponentially alongside capabilities. Examines compute, API, and infrastructure costs as agents become more autonomous and handle longer task chains.
hackernews.tldr_zh: 分析 AI Agent 成本是否随能力指数级增长。探讨随着 Agent 变得更自主、处理更长任务链，计算、API 和基础设施成本的变化趋势。

hackernews.title: Show HN: LangAlpha – what if Claude Code was built for Wall Street?
hackernews.tldr: Show HN: LangAlpha – what if Claude Code was built for Wall Street?
hackernews.tldr_zh: Show HN: LangAlpha – what if Claude Code was built for Wall Street?
